LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANTS PETER FADER AND CYNTHIA DIETZMANN'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. MR. GADDY CHECKED WITH HIS ATTORNEY AND INDICATES THAT COUNSEL ARE SUBMITTING TO THE TENTATIVE RULING. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION; THE DEMURRER FAILS TO ADDRESS ALLEGATIONS RE RETURNED CHECKS; FIVE PER CENT IS NOT UNREASONABLE ON ITS FACE; A PARTY MAY SEEK DAMAGES FOR ANY BREACH OF THE CONTRACT; THE MATERIALITY OF THE BREACH IS RELEVANT ONLY ON THE ISSUE OF EXCUSING PERFORMANCE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS TO PLEAD FACTS GIVING RISE TO A CLAIM NOT EMBRACED BY THE CONTRACT AND TO DEMONSTRATE HOW CROSS-COMPLAINANT WAS INJURED BY THE OPEN DOOR. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ORDER OVERRULING CROSS-DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER OF THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANTS PETER FADER AND CYNTHIA DIETZMANN'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: JOHN L. GADDY, DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: MR. GADDY CHECKED WITH HIS ATTORNEY AND INDICATES THAT COUNSEL ARE SUBMITTING TO THE TENTATIVE RULING. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION; THE DEMURRER FAILS TO ADDRESS ALLEGATIONS RE RETURNED CHECKS; FIVE PER CENT IS NOT UNREASONABLE ON ITS FACE; A PARTY MAY SEEK DAMAGES FOR ANY BREACH OF THE CONTRACT; THE MATERIALITY OF THE BREACH IS RELEVANT ONLY ON THE ISSUE OF EXCUSING PERFORMANCE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS TO PLEAD FACTS GIVING RISE TO A CLAIM NOT EMBRACED BY THE CONTRACT AND TO DEMONSTRATE HOW CROSS-COMPLAINANT WAS INJURED BY THE OPEN DOOR. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
